keyword.title: Keyword (Industry/Service)
keyword.description: The specific industry or service (e.g., 'IT services', 'logistics', 'accounting').

location.title: Location (Optional Region)
location.description: Singapore Region (e.g., 'CBD', 'Jurong', 'Changi'). Leave blank to search all of SG.

maxLeads.title: Maximum Leads
maxLeads.description: Maximum number of Singapore SME leads to extract.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Apify Residential Proxy (Singapore targeted) is highly required.
